title: Sum of digits (recursive)
prompt: Write sum_digits(n) that returns the sum of the digits of a non-negative integer, using recursion.

details.restate: Add together the individual digits of the number and give back the total. The kata asks you to do it with recursion.

io.because: a single digit sums to itself

terms.meaning: one of the characters 0-9 making up a number; 1234 has four digits
a function that calls itself on a smaller piece of the problem until the piece is trivial
